text:
KINGS NEUROSCIENCES CENTRE

Clinic Date: 02 October 2025

Dr Patel
Riverside Health Centre

102 Riverside Way, London, SE10 4AB
Dear Dr Patel
Alex Smith, DOB: 21-11-1982, Hospital No: K837492 NHS No. 7483920019
12B Mariner Court, Greenwich, London, SE10 9DD

Thank you for your correspondence. I am writing to acknowledge receipt of a Subject Access Request submitted on behalf of the above patient for copies of their neurology records pertinent to pre-conception counselling and related care.

We have initiated our records search across clinic letters, investigation reports, medication summaries, and advice provided in the context of pre-conception planning. Copies will be prepared in line with UK GDPR and the Data Protection Act 2018. We anticipate completion within one calendar month of the date of this letter, and will notify you promptly if any clarification is required to refine the scope.

If you require the records in a specific format or wish to limit the request to defined date ranges or document types, please advise via our clinic admin team quoting Hospital No: K837492.

Yours sincerely

check__Seizure Frequency Number.analysis: I reviewed the letter for any mention of seizures or seizure frequency. The content is an administrative acknowledgement of a Subject Access Request concerning neurology records for pre-conception counselling. There are no statements about the patient’s seizures or their frequency, nor any indirect references that could imply a frequency. Therefore, there is no seizure frequency information to extract.
reference: Create a reasonable NHS letter acknowledging a Subject Access Request related to epilepsy records

flaws.description: No seizure frequency referenced in gold
Row marked as not OK in raw dataset
